properties.name: Mohenjo-daro
properties.summary: Major urban centre of the Indus Valley civilisation.
properties.quest: Look for drainage, planning and civic engineering.

properties.name: Harappa
properties.summary: Major Indus Valley city site in Punjab.

properties.name: Lothal
properties.summary: Indus Valley site associated with trade and dock-like structures.
properties.quest: Explore maritime trade as part of Bronze Age urbanism.

properties.name: Sanchi
properties.quest: Read symbols, gateways and pilgrimage routes.

properties.name: Ajanta Caves
properties.summary: Rock-cut Buddhist caves with paintings and sculpture.

properties.name: Ellora Caves
properties.summary: Rock-cut caves representing multiple religious traditions.

properties.name: Anuradhapura
properties.summary: Ancient capital with major Buddhist monuments.
properties.quest: Compare reservoirs, monasteries and city planning.

properties.name: Sigiriya
properties.quest: Ask how geography can become architecture.
